title: UniWeb Software | Control Applications
content_html:
UniWeb software for building control

UniWeb is a friendly WEB-based interface software (HMI, SCADA).
The software is very user friendly and allows him to control and control all the control systems in the building using a standard browser.

UniWeb enables a unique and friendly powerful user experience.
The WEB interface allows simultaneous connection of up to 150 computers located in one network to the control system.

UniWeb is the optimal solution in public and industrial buildings for controlling heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems (HVAC), energy systems, lighting, fire detection (all companies with open protocols) and more.
